description_long: This object is a long, straight sword with a double-edged blade that extends symmetrically from a central axis. The blade appears to be made of a dark, metallic material with subtle vertical grooves running along its length, giving it a reinforced and slightly textured appearance. The crossguard is simple and straight, also dark in color, providing protection for the wielder's hand. The handle is cylindrical and matches the blade in color, with a rounded pommel at the end for balance and grip security. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings on the blade, guard, or handle, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for practical use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a dark metallic blade, simple crossguard, and cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel. The design is utilitarian and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, crossguard, and cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle and crossguard.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the straight, minimalistic design.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical handle, dark material, rounded pommel, no visible wrapping or ornamentation
